sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) as total FROM payments WHERE DATE(paid_at)=CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) as total FROM payments WHERE DATE(paid_at)=CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) as total FROM payments WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', paid_at)=DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)

text: hôm nay có bao nhiêu đơn
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM orders WHERE DATE(order_time)=CURRENT_DATE
SELECT m.name, SUM(oi.quantity) as total FROM order_items oi JOIN menus m ON oi.menu_id=m.id WHERE DATE(oi.item_order_time)=CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY m.name ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT m.name, SUM(oi.quantity) as total FROM order_items oi JOIN menus m ON oi.menu_id=m.id WHERE DATE(oi.item_order_time)=CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY m.name ORDER BY total ASC LIMIT 5
SELECT m.name, i.stock_quantity as total FROM inventory i JOIN menus m ON i.menu_id=m.id WHERE i.stock_quantity <= i.min_quantity
